title: No-Runway Discipline
html:
The demand-side complement to bridge income strategies: the micro-financial vigilance Yahir runs on himself when there's no buffer. Where bridge-income is how money comes in, no-runway is how money doesn't go out. Per Memory: "Self-funded, no runway buffer. Has to survive AND build simultaneously."

The clearest specimen is 2025 09 23 how im scraping by — written in his first month in Austin, modified through December as new tactics emerged. The note's tone is the discipline made visible: "I just got mad at myself mentally for spending $5.50 on a blended Horchata. I'm seriously making it out the mud." And: "I am so fucking broke I needed to change my oil for $55 dollars and I know that's going to fuck me." The escalation ladder is explicit — "Sell my gun at a 50% discount to pay rent and ask my dad embarrassingly for an advance" — and the question mark on "Plasma donation?!!" is the closest thing to a cry for help in the corpus.

The discipline is older than Austin. It's visible in the 2024 09 25 things to do in chengdu meal log — every meal in Chengdu tracked in CNY (1st meal 72, 2nd meal 16, pastries 5, frog meal 97), the trip treated as a P&L. It's in the 2024 12 21 todos BroMenu spec where the explicit instruction is "Reduce API call costs by caching responses wherever possible" and "avoid paying for the apple developer fee" by physical-device testing. It's in the 2025 05 30 todos decision to take a Planet Fitness gym job and chase an ISSA CPT cert as bridge income. And it's in the Supabase / free-tier-everything stack choice for Brotein.

This is one half of the voluntary adversity philosophy from 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream becoming lived practice — the don't spend half. The other half (don't take comfort, don't cash out early) lives in bridge income strategies. Both together are the operating system of self-funded Rankett.

Source summaries

  • 2025 09 23 how im scraping by — the canonical specimen
  • 2024 09 25 things to do in chengdu — meal-log discipline
  • 2024 12 21 todos — caching + no-Apple-fee design
  • 2025 05 30 todos — gym/cert bridge income context

Connections

  • bridge income strategies — supply-side counterpart
  • voluntary adversity — the philosophical root
  • rankett — the venture this protects
  • austin tx — current geography
  • fear of not doing — the deeper engine
  • supabase / planet fitness / doordash — concrete tools
